hero.title: Dynasty HQ
hero.subtitle: Most tools stop at player rankings. Dynasty HQ turns your Sleeper league into the model: DHQ values, owner tendencies, draft history, trade memory, and Scout decisions in one operating system.
hero.freeLine: Free forever for one Sleeper league. No credit card.

panels.label: DHQ Model
panels.headline: Values built from this league
panels.copy: Roster settings, scoring, draft history, and market context feed every player and pick value.

phoneCards.title: Ask the move
phoneCards.copy: Get a direct answer from current league context.

phoneCards.title: Save the read
phoneCards.copy: Decision notes travel with the player.

differentiators.title: Dynasty advice gets useful when it knows your league.
differentiators.subtitle: Generic ranks can tell you who is good. Dynasty HQ tells you what matters inside this room: your scoring, your owners, your history, your roster window.

cards.title: Values built from your league, not a public list.
cards.copy: DHQ values every player and pick against the rules that actually decide your league: scoring settings, roster structure, age windows, positional scarcity, draft outcomes, and market context.

rows.title: Scoring aware
rows.copy: Superflex, TE premium, IDP, bench depth, and custom formats change the math.

rows.title: Pick aware
rows.copy: Draft capital is tied to your league history and slot-specific outcomes, not flat round labels.

rows.title: Window aware
rows.copy: Roster decisions account for build, peak, decline, and value windows by position.

cards.title: The trade partner matters as much as the trade chart.
cards.copy: Dynasty HQ tracks owner tendencies: who hoards picks, who overreacts after losses, who buys name value, and which roster pressures create real leverage.

rows.title: Trade fit
rows.copy: Find the managers with both need and motivation.

rows.title: Timing
rows.copy: Know when to hold the line and when to send the offer.

features.title: The pieces compound because they share the same context.
features.subtitle: Scout, War Room, Trophy Room, and the trade tools are not separate widgets. They all read from the same league memory.

cards.title: Scout is the fast layer
cards.copy: Ask a lineup, waiver, trade, or roster question on mobile and get an answer using your current Sleeper league context.

cards.title: War Room is the deep layer
cards.copy: Turn quick reads into trade boards, roster plans, draft strategy, and owner-specific negotiation paths.

cards.title: Trade memory
cards.copy: Completed trades, manager habits, and saved targets stay connected so advice improves with league history.

cards.title: Trophy Room history
cards.copy: Championships, draft results, owner records, Hall of Fame entries, and chronicles stay scoped to the active league.

cards.title: AI with real context
cards.copy: Alex answers with your roster, scoring, history, values, owner profiles, and current league state in the prompt.

cards.title: Decision backlog
cards.copy: Save tags, notes, targets, and trade ideas so today's thought is still there when you return at the deadline.

pricing.title: Start free. Go Pro when you're ready.
pricing.subtitle: Scout one Sleeper league free, forever. Pro unlocks the full engine — 7-day free trial, cancel anytime.
pricing.leaguePassCopy: Get your whole league on Dynasty HQ at a group discount.

platforms.title: Platform status
platforms.copy: Live versions are Sleeper-only. Additional connectors remain in sandbox beta until they are ready.
